title: pulicaria odora
intro: Pulicaria odora, also known as White Clary Sage, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities, which help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Pulicaria odora include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Pulicaria odora can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
